creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
Created attachment 202332
diff to upgrade to ceph12 v12.2.11

A new version of V12 (luminous was released)
This is the update for it.

But I'm moving it from net/ceph to net/ceph12, to keep it inline with net/ceph13 and the soon to be released net/ceph14

So for the commiter, please
cd /usr/ports/net
svn move ceph ceph12

And then apply the attached diff, or use the shar
